CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK( mfg_Service_End_Date__c ), TRUE, mfg_Service_End_Date__c >= TODAY() )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates whether the service is applicable for the asset. If the expiration date is blank, the service is considered valid for a lifetime. If the expiration date is in the past, the service is not applicable.
CustomField.label: Service Applicable
